---
title: "Article title"
date: last-modified
toc: false
fig-align: center
fig-width: 3.346
fig-height: 3.346
fig-format: png
fig-dpi: 600
format: 
  docx:
    toc: true
bibliography:
  - proj/biblio/common_biblio.bib
  - proj/biblio/prj_biblio.bib
output-dir: "outputs"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: label1
#| output: asis

```



This article is written according to CHEERS 2022 guideline
[@husereau2022consolidatedhealtheconomic]; numbers in square brackets
(e.g. [10a]) are CHEERS item identifiers


# References

<!-- 
- codice inline in R funziona out of the box: `{r} 1 + 1`
- codice inline python non funziona? `{python} risultato`.
- Citazione: inline [@moher2010consort]
- LaTeX full formula: $$ \sum_{i=1}^n x_i $$
- landscape come

::: {.landscape} 
qui e` in landscape
:::
qui non piu`

- per inserire vai a capo di pagina (lasciare linea prima e dopo)

{{< pagebreak >}}

-->
